mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.permission_code as permissionCode, p.permission_name as permissionName, p.module, p.description, rp.created_at as createdAt FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.module, p.id
SELECT r.id, r.role_code as roleCode, r.role_name as roleName, r.description FROM role r INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id WHERE rp.permission_id = #{permissionId} ORDER BY r.id
mapper.insert:
insert into role_permission(role_id, permission_id, created_at) values
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, now())
mapper.select: select * from role_permission where role_id = #{roleId} and permission_id = #{permissionId}
